judge_thought:
Explanation: 
The table shows the API (Academic Performance Index) scores for Thomas Jefferson High School over the years 2007 to 2011:
2007: 457
2008: 516
2009: 514
2010: 546
2011: 546
The question asks for a year other than 2010 when the API was 546. From the data, the API was also 546 in 2011. Therefore, the Prediction Answer of 2011 is correct.
